description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring a wooden fixed stock and handguard with a reddish-brown finish. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal, giving the weapon a sturdy and functional appearance. The rifle is equipped with a curved, detachable box magazine, likely made of metal or polymer, and a prominent front sight post paired with a rear notch sight. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle device, possibly a flash hider. The trigger guard and pistol grip are ergonomically shaped, with the grip matching the wood tone of the stock. Overall, the rifle exudes a rugged, reliable aesthetic typical of military firearms used in urban environments.
description: A rugged assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, curved magazine, and matte black metal receiver and barrel, featuring classic iron sights and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the receiver, magazine, and the wooden components in detail.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the straight alignment of the barrel and sights.
